surfaceStructuralHomePerspective.rationale: Runtime artifacts commonly live under source or implementation homes.
Application frameworks may place runtime route, layout, host, or entry structures under app homes.
Compatibility and adapter materials may support runtime behavior without becoming the primary runtime home.
UI-facing application composition often lives under app homes.
UI-facing implementation may also live under source homes depending on framework structure.
Quality-support artifacts align with the current repo's singular test structural home.
Documentation surfaces align with documentation homes.
Tooling automation commonly lives under scripts homes.
Configuration surfaces align with configuration homes.
Data surfaces align with structured data homes.
Operational surfaces align with operations homes.
Asset surfaces align with static asset homes.
Generated surfaces align with generated output homes.
Vendor surfaces align with third-party or externally maintained homes.
Example surfaces align with demo, sample, or tutorial homes.
Experimental surfaces align with prototype or exploratory homes.
